questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 云中运行其关键存储应用程序。该应用程序在两个 AWS 区域中使用 Amazon S3。该公司希望应用程序能够将远程用户数据发送到最近的 S3 存储桶，而不会造成公共网络拥塞。该公司还希望应用程序能够以最少的 Amazon S3 管理进行故障转移。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs its critical storage application in the AWS Cloud. The application uses Amazon S3 in two AWS Regions. The company wants the application to send remote user data to the nearest S3 bucket with no public network congestion. The company also wants the application to fail over with the least amount of management of Amazon S3. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在两个区域之间实施主动-主动设计。配置应用程序以使用距离用户最近的区域 S3 端点。
A.en: Implement an active-active design between the two Regions. Configure the application to use the regional S3 endpoints closest to the user.

B.zh: 将主动-被动配置与 S3 多区域接入点结合使用。为每个区域创建一个全局端点。
B.en: Use an active-passive configuration with S3 Multi-Region Access Points. Create a global endpoint for each of the Regions.

C.zh: 将用户数据发送到距离用户最近的区域 S3 端点。配置S3跨账户复制规则以保持S3存储桶同步。
C.en: Send user data to the regional S3 endpoints closest to the user. Configure an S3 cross-account replication rule to keep the S3 buckets synchronized.

D.zh: 将 Amazon S3 设置为在具有单个全局终端节点的主动-主动配置中使用多区域接入点。配置S3跨区域复制。
D.en: Set up Amazon S3 to use Multi-Region Access Points in an active-active configuration with a single global endpoint. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用区域 S3 端点实现双活设计： 技术分析：虽然双活设计可以提供高可用性，但直接使用区域 S3 端点不会自动处理故障转移或减少公共网络拥塞。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Implementing an active-active design using regional S3 endpoints: Technical analysis: While an active-active design can provide high availability, using regional S3 endpoints directly does not automatically handle failover or reduce public network congestion.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用主动-被动配置和S3多区域接入点： 技术分析：主动-被动配置需要手动管理故障转移，增加了管理复杂性。虽然S3多区域接入点可以优化数据传输，但主动-被动设计并不能满足“最低限度管理”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using active-passive configurations and S3 multi-zone access points: Technical analysis: Active-passive configurations require manual management of failover, increasing management complexity. While S3 multi-zone access points can optimize data transfer, the active-passive design does not meet the "minimum management" requirement.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用区域S3端点并配置跨账户复制：技术分析：跨账户复制可以同步数据，但无法自动处理故障转移或减少公共网络拥塞。直接使用区域端点也不满足“最低管理”要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Use regional S3 endpoints and configure cross-account replication: Technical analysis: Cross-account replication can synchronize data, but cannot automatically handle failover or reduce public network congestion. Using zone endpoints directly also does not meet the "minimum management" requirements.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用S3多区域接入点和跨区域复制：技术分析： S3多区域接入点提供单一全局端点，自动将用户数据分发到最近的区域，减少公共网络拥塞。跨区域复制保证数据同步，双活配置提供高可用性和自动故障转移，满足“极简管理”的要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Using S3 Multi-Region Access Points and Cross-Region Replication: Technical Analysis: S3 Multi-Region Access Points provide a single global endpoint that automatically distributes user data to the nearest region, reducing public network congestion. Cross-regional replication ensures data synchronization, and active-active configuration provides high availability and automatic failover to meet the requirements of "minimalist management".

answer_text.zh: D. 将 Amazon S3 设置为在具有单个全局终端节点的主动-主动配置中使用多区域接入点。配置S3跨区域复制。
answer_text.en: D. Set up Amazon S3 to use Multi-Region Access Points in an active-active configuration with a single global endpoint. Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用S3多区域接入点和跨区域复制：技术分析： S3多区域接入点提供单一全局端点，自动将用户数据分发到最近的区域，减少公共网络拥塞。跨区域复制保证数据同步，双活配置提供高可用性和自动故障转移，满足“极简管理”的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Using S3 Multi-Region Access Points and Cross-Region Replication: Technical Analysis: S3 Multi-Region Access Points provide a single global endpoint that automatically distributes user data to the nearest region, reducing public network congestion. Cross-regional replication ensures data synchronization, and active-active configuration provides high availability and automatic failover to meet the requirements of "minimalist management".

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将数据中心从其本地位置迁移到 AWS。该公司有多个遗留应用程序托管在各个虚拟服务器上。无法更改应用程序设计。每个单独的虚拟服务器当前都作为自己的 EC2 实例运行。解决方案架构师需要确保应用程序在迁移到 AWS 后可靠且具有容错能力。这些应用程序将在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating a data center from its on-premises location to AWS. The company has several legacy applications that are hosted on individual virtual servers. Changes to the application designs cannot be made. Each individual virtual server currently runs as its own EC2 instance. A solutions architect needs to ensure that the applications are reliable and fault tolerant after migration to AWS. The applications will run on Amazon EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 创建一个 Auto Scaling 组，该组最少有 1 个，最多有 1 个。创建每个应用程序实例的 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。使用 AMI 在 Auto Scaling 组中创建 EC2 实例 在 Auto Scaling 组前面配置 Application Load Balancer。
A.en: Create an Auto Scaling group that has a minimum of one and a maximum of one. Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of each application instance. Use the AMI to create EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group Configure an Application Load Balancer in front of the Auto Scaling group.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 为托管每个应用程序的 EC2 实例创建每小时备份。将备份存储在单独可用区的 Amazon S3 中。配置灾难恢复流程以从每个应用程序的最新备份恢复 EC2 实例。
B.en: Use AWS Backup to create an hourly backup of the EC2 instance that hosts each application. Store the backup in Amazon S3 in a separate Availability Zone. Configure a disaster recovery process to restore the EC2 instance for each application from its most recent backup.

C.zh: 创建每个应用程序实例的 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。从 AMI 启动两个新的 EC2 实例。将每个 EC2 实例放置在单独的可用区中。配置以 EC2 实例作为目标的网络负载均衡器。
C.en: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of each application instance. Launch two new EC2 instances from the AMI. Place each EC2 instance in a separate Availability Zone. Configure a Network Load Balancer that has the EC2 instances as targets.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Mitigation Hub Refactor Spaces 将每个应用程序迁移出 EC2 实例。将每个应用程序的功能分解为单独的组件。使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 上托管每个应用程序。
D.en: Use AWS Mitigation Hub Refactor Spaces to migrate each application off the EC2 instance. Break down functionality from each application into individual components. Host each application on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with an AWS Fargate launch type.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析：使用Auto Scaling组可以保证实例的自动恢复，从而提高可靠性和容错能力。将最小值设置为1，最大值设置为1，可以保证始终有一个实例在运行，满足问题的要求。通过Application Load Balancer可以实现流量分发，进一步增强高可用性。该选项正确，符合题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Using Auto Scaling groups can ensure automatic recovery of instances, thereby improving reliability and fault tolerance. Setting the minimum value to 1 and the maximum value to 1 ensures that there is always one instance running, meeting the requirements of the problem. Traffic distribution can be achieved through Application Load Balancer to further enhance high availability. This option is correct and meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析： AWS Backup提供了备份和恢复能力，但无法实现实时高可用性和容错。容灾过程需要人工干预，无法满足问题中对可靠性和容错性的要求。这个选项是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: AWS Backup provides backup and recovery capabilities, but cannot achieve real-time high availability and fault tolerance. The disaster recovery process requires manual intervention and cannot meet the requirements for reliability and fault tolerance in the problem. This option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：该选项通过在不同可用区部署两个实例并使用网络负载均衡器来实现高可用性。然而，问题明确指出每个应用程序只能在单个实例上运行，因此该选项不满足问题要求。这个选项是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: This option achieves high availability by deploying two instances in different Availability Zones and using a network load balancer. However, the question clearly states that each application can only run on a single instance, so this option does not meet the question requirements. This option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：此选项涉及重构应用程序，但问题明确指出不能对应用程序设计进行任何更改。该选项不符合题目要求。这个选项是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: This option involves refactoring the application, but the question clearly states that no changes can be made to the application design. This option does not meet the question requirements. This option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: A. 创建一个 Auto Scaling 组，该组最少有 1 个，最多有 1 个。创建每个应用程序实例的 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。使用 AMI 在 Auto Scaling 组中创建 EC2 实例 在 Auto Scaling 组前面配置 Application Load Balancer。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Auto Scaling group that has a minimum of one and a maximum of one. Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of each application instance. Use the AMI to create EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group Configure an Application Load Balancer in front of the Auto Scaling group.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (50%) C (50%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析：使用Auto Scaling组可以保证实例的自动恢复，从而提高可靠性和容错能力。将最小值设置为1，最大值设置为1，可以保证始终有一个实例在运行，满足问题的要求。通过Application Load Balancer可以实现流量分发，进一步增强高可用性。该选项正确，符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (50%) C (50%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Using Auto Scaling groups can ensure automatic recovery of instances, thereby improving reliability and fault tolerance. Setting the minimum value to 1 and the maximum value to 1 ensures that there is always one instance running, meeting the requirements of the problem. Traffic distribution can be achieved through Application Load Balancer to further enhance high availability. This option is correct and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望通过为每个工作负载创建一个 AWS 账户来隔离其工作负载。该公司需要一种能够集中管理工作负载网络组件的解决方案。该解决方案还必须创建具有自动安全控制（护栏）的账户。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to isolate its workloads by creating an AWS account for each workload. The company needs a solution that centrally manages networking components for the workloads. The solution also must create accounts with automatic security controls (guardrails). Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 部署账户。创建一个具有 VPC 的网络账户，该 VPC 具有私有子网和公有子网。使用 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) 与工作负载账户共享子网。
A.en: Use AWS Control Tower to deploy accounts. Create a networking account that has a VPC with private subnets and public subnets. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share the subnets with the workload accounts.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Organizations 部署账户。创建一个具有 VPC 的网络账户，该 VPC 具有私有子网和公有子网。使用 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) 与工作负载账户共享子网。
B.en: Use AWS Organizations to deploy accounts. Create a networking account that has a VPC with private subnets and public subnets. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share the subnets with the workload accounts.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Control Tower 部署账户。在每个工作负载账户中部署一个 VPC。将每个 VPC 配置为使用中转网关连接通过检查 VPC 进行路由。
C.en: Use AWS Control Tower to deploy accounts. Deploy a VPC in each workload account. Configure each VPC to route through an inspection VPC by using a transit gateway attachment.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Organizations 部署账户。在每个工作负载账户中部署一个 VPC。将每个 VPC 配置为使用中转网关连接通过检查 VPC 进行路由。
D.en: Use AWS Organizations to deploy accounts. Deploy a VPC in each workload account. Configure each VPC to route through an inspection VPC by using a transit gateway attachment.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Control Tower 可自动创建和管理多个账户，同时提供预定义的安全控制 (Guardrails)。正确：可以通过创建专用网络账户来集中管理网络资源（如VPC、子网）。正确： AWS RAM 允许跨账户共享资源（例如子网），从而降低重复配置的复杂性。此选项满足问题要求并且具有最小的操作开销。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Control Tower automates the creation and management of multiple accounts while providing predefined security controls (Guardrails). Correct: Network resources (such as VPCs, subnets) can be centrally managed by creating dedicated network accounts. Correct: AWS RAM allows resources (such as subnets) to be shared across accounts, reducing the complexity of duplicate configurations. This option meets the problem requirements and has minimal operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Control Tower 部署账户。创建一个具有 VPC 的网络账户，该 VPC 具有私有子网和公有子网。使用 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) 与工作负载账户共享子网。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Control Tower to deploy accounts. Create a networking account that has a VPC with private subnets and public subnets. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share the subnets with the workload accounts.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (81%) B (19%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Control Tower 可自动创建和管理多个账户，同时提供预定义的安全控制 (Guardrails)。正确：可以通过创建专用网络账户来集中管理网络资源（如VPC、子网）。正确： AWS RAM 允许跨账户共享资源（例如子网），从而降低重复配置的复杂性。此选项满足问题要求并且具有最小的操作开销。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (81%) B (19%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Control Tower automates the creation and management of multiple accounts while providing predefined security controls (Guardrails). Correct: Network resources (such as VPCs, subnets) can be centrally managed by creating dedicated network accounts. Correct: AWS RAM allows resources (such as subnets) to be shared across accounts, reducing the complexity of duplicate configurations. This option meets the problem requirements and has minimal operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上托管一个网站。该网站提供静态内容。网站流量不断增加。该公司希望最大限度地降低网站托管成本。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a website on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The website serves static content. Website traffic is increasing. The company wants to minimize the website hosting costs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将网站移至 Amazon S3 存储桶。为 S3 存储桶配置 Amazon CloudFront 分配。
A.en: Move the website to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution for the S3 bucket.

B.zh: 将网站移至 Amazon S3 存储桶。为 S3 存储桶配置 Amazon ElastiCache 集群。
B.en: Move the website to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon ElastiCache cluster for the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 将网站移至 AWS Amplify。配置 ALB 以解析 Amplify 网站。
C.en: Move the website to AWS Amplify. Configure an ALB to resolve to the Amplify website.

D.zh: 将网站移至 AWS Amplify。配置 EC2 实例以缓存网站。
D.en: Move the website to AWS Amplify. Configure EC2 instances to cache the website.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon S3 非常适合托管大型网站，因为它价格便宜且易于扩展。正确： Amazon CloudFront 可加速内容交付、减少延迟并降低数据传输成本。此选项完全符合要求：托管国家内容并最大限度地降低成本。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is ideal for hosting large websites because it is cheap and easy to scale. Correct: Amazon CloudFront accelerates content delivery, reduces latency, and lowers data transfer costs. This option fits the bill perfectly: host national content and minimize costs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon ElastiCache 主要用于缓存动态数据，而不是有状态内容。错误： S3本身已经是一个高效的有状态内容存储解决方案，不需要额外的缓存层。该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ElastiCache is primarily used to cache dynamic data, not stateful content. Wrong: S3 itself is already an efficient stateful content storage solution and does not require an additional caching layer. This option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Amplify 主要用于构建和托管现代 Web 应用程序，而不仅仅是最先进的内容托管。错误：使用ALB会增加额外的成本，不符合“成本最小化”的要求。该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Amplify is primarily intended for building and hosting modern web applications, rather than simply state-of-the-art content hosting. Error: Using ALB will add additional costs and does not meet the requirement of "cost minimization". This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Amplify 不需要 EC2 实例来缓存内容。错误：使用EC2实例会大幅增加成本，不符合“成本最小化”的要求。该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Amplify does not require EC2 instances to cache content. Error: Using EC2 instances will significantly increase costs and does not meet the requirement of "cost minimization". This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 将网站移至 Amazon S3 存储桶。为 S3 存储桶配置 Amazon CloudFront 分配。
answer_text.en: A. Move the website to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution for the S3 bucket.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (80%) B (20%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon S3 非常适合托管大型网站，因为它价格便宜且易于扩展。正确： Amazon CloudFront 可加速内容交付、减少延迟并降低数据传输成本。此选项完全符合要求：托管国家内容并最大限度地降低成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (80%) B (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 is ideal for hosting large websites because it is cheap and easy to scale. Correct: Amazon CloudFront accelerates content delivery, reduces latency, and lowers data transfer costs. This option fits the bill perfectly: host national content and minimize costs.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在为其在 AWS 上托管的媒体应用程序实施共享存储解决方案。该公司需要能够使用 SMB 客户端访问存储的数据。哪种解决方案能够以最少的管理开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is implementing a shared storage solution for a media application that the company hosts on AWS. The company needs the ability to use SMB clients to access stored data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead?

A.zh: 创建 AWS Storage Gateway 卷网关。创建使用所需客户端协议的文件共享。将应用程序服务器连接到文件共享。
A.en: Create an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway. Create a file share that uses the required client protocol. Connect the application server to the file share.

B.zh: 创建 AWS Storage Gateway 磁带网关。配置磁带以使用 Amazon S3。将应用程序服务器连接到磁带网关。
B.en: Create an AWS Storage Gateway Tape Gateway. Configure tapes to use Amazon S3. Connect the application server to the Tape Gateway.

C.zh: 创建 Amazon EC2 Windows 实例。在实例上安装并配置 Windows 文件共享角色。将应用程序服务器连接到文件共享。
C.en: Create an Amazon EC2 Windows instance. Install and configure a Windows file share role on the instance. Connect the application server to the file share.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 文件系统。将应用程序服务器连接到文件系统。
D.en: Create an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system. Connect the application server to the file system.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Volume Gateway主要用于块存储（Block Storage），而不是文件存储（File Storage）。虽然可以创建文件共享，但不直接支持SMB协议，管理开销较高。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Volume Gateway is mainly used for block storage (Block Storage), not file storage (File Storage). Although file shares can be created, the SMB protocol is not directly supported and the management overhead is high. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：磁带网关主要应用于备份、归档场景，模拟磁带设备。它不支持文件共享功能，也不支持SMB协议。这个选项根本不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Tape gateway is mainly used in backup and archiving scenarios to simulate tape devices. It does not support file sharing functionality, nor does it support the SMB protocol. This option does not meet the question requirements at all.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：通过 EC2 实例安装和配置 Windows 文件共享角色支持 SMB 协议。但这种方式需要手动管理EC2实例，包括更新、备份、高可用配置等操作，管理开销较高。因此，该选项虽然可行，但不符合“最低管理开销”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Installing and configuring a Windows file share role through an EC2 instance supports the SMB protocol. However, this method requires manual management of EC2 instances, including updates, backups, high-availability configuration and other operations, and the management overhead is high. Therefore, this option, while feasible, does not meet the "minimum administrative overhead" requirement.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是一项专门为支持 Windows 文件共享而设计的托管服务，并且本身支持 SMB 协议。它是一个完全托管的解决方案，以最小的管理开销提供高可用性、备份和性能优化。该选项完全满足题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a hosting service designed specifically to support Windows file sharing and natively supports the SMB protocol. It is a fully managed solution that provides high availability, backup and performance optimization with minimal management overhead. This option fully meets the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 创建 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 文件系统。将应用程序服务器连接到文件系统。
answer_text.en: D. Create an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system. Connect the application server to the file system.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是一项专门为支持 Windows 文件共享而设计的托管服务，并且本身支持 SMB 协议。它是一个完全托管的解决方案，以最小的管理开销提供高可用性、备份和性能优化。该选项完全满足题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a hosting service designed specifically to support Windows file sharing and natively supports the SMB protocol. It is a fully managed solution that provides high availability, backup and performance optimization with minimal management overhead. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在设计其生产应用程序的灾难恢复 (DR) 策略。该应用程序由 us-east-1 区域的 Amazon Aurora 集群上的 MySQL 数据库提供支持。该公司选择 us-west-1 区域作为其 DR 区域。该公司的目标恢复点目标 (RPO) 为 5 分钟，目标恢复时间目标 (RTO) 为 20 分钟。该公司希望尽量减少配置更改。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is designing its production application's disaster recovery (DR) strategy. The application is backed by a MySQL database on an Amazon Aurora cluster in the us-east-1 Region. The company has chosen the us-west-1 Region as its DR Region. The company's target recovery point objective (RPO) is 5 minutes and the target recovery time objective (RTO) is 20 minutes. The company wants to minimize configuration changes. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

A.zh: 在 us-west-1 中创建一个大小与生产应用程序的 Aurora MySQL 集群写入器实例类似的 Aurora 只读副本。
A.en: Create an Aurora read replica in us-west-1 similar in size to the production application's Aurora MySQL cluster writer instance.

B.zh: 将 Aurora 集群转换为 Aurora 全局数据库。配置托管故障转移。
B.en: Convert the Aurora cluster to an Aurora global database. Configure managed failover.

C.zh: 在 us-west-1 中创建一个具有跨区域复制的新 Aurora 集群。
C.en: Create a new Aurora cluster in us-west-1 that has Cross-Region Replication.

D.zh: 在 us-west-1 中创建一个新的 Aurora 集群。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 同步两个集群。
D.en: Create a new Aurora cluster in us-west-1. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to sync both clusters.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： Aurora支持跨区域只读副本，但这种方式无法满足5分钟的RPO，因为跨区域复制的延迟可能会超过5分钟。此外，故障转移需要手动配置，增加了操作复杂性。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Aurora supports cross-region read-only replicas, but this method cannot meet the 5-minute RPO because the delay of cross-region replication may exceed 5 minutes. Additionally, failover requires manual configuration, increasing operational complexity.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： Aurora全局数据库支持跨区域复制，复制延迟通常在1度以内，可以轻松满足5分钟的RPO。此外， Aurora全局数据库提供托管故障转移功能，可以快速切换到备用区域，满足20分钟的RTO，同时降低配置复杂性。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Aurora global database supports cross-region replication, and the replication delay is usually within 1 degree, which can easily meet the 5-minute RPO. In addition, the Aurora global database provides managed failover capabilities that can quickly switch to a standby region, meeting an RTO of 20 minutes while reducing configuration complexity.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：跨地域复制可以实现数据同步，但这种方式需要手动配置故障转移，无法满足20分钟的RTO要求。另外，操作复杂度较高。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Cross-region replication can achieve data synchronization, but this method requires manual configuration of failover and cannot meet the 20-minute RTO requirement. In addition, the operation complexity is high.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： AWS DMS可以实现数据同步，但延迟可能较高，无法满足5分钟RPO。另外，故障转移需要手动操作，无法满足20分钟的RTO要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: AWS DMS can achieve data synchronization, but the latency may be high and cannot meet the 5-minute RPO. In addition, failover requires manual operation and cannot meet the 20-minute RTO requirement.

answer_text.zh: B. 将 Aurora 集群转换为 Aurora 全局数据库。配置托管故障转移。
answer_text.en: B. Convert the Aurora cluster to an Aurora global database. Configure managed failover.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析： Aurora全局数据库支持跨区域复制，复制延迟通常在1度以内，可以轻松满足5分钟的RPO。此外， Aurora全局数据库提供托管故障转移功能，可以快速切换到备用区域，满足20分钟的RTO，同时降低配置复杂性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Aurora global database supports cross-region replication, and the replication delay is usually within 1 degree, which can easily meet the 5-minute RPO. In addition, the Aurora global database provides managed failover capabilities that can quickly switch to a standby region, meeting an RTO of 20 minutes while reducing configuration complexity.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司每周在工作周第一天之前都会运行一项关键数据分析作业。该工作至少需要 1 小时才能完成分析。该作业是有​​状态的，不能容忍中断。该公司需要一个解决方案来在 AWS 上运行该作业。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a critical data analysis job each week before the first day of the work week. The job requires at least 1 hour to complete the analysis. The job is stateful and cannot tolerate interruptions. The company needs a solution to run the job on AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 为作业创建一个容器。使用 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 安排作业作为 AWS Fargate 任务在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群上运行。
A.en: Create a container for the job. Schedule the job to run as an AWS Fargate task on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster by using Amazon EventBridge Scheduler.

B.zh: 配置作业以在 AWS Lambda 函数中运行。在 Amazon EventBridge 中创建计划规则以调用 Lambda 函数。
B.en: Configure the job to run in an AWS Lambda function. Create a scheduled rule in Amazon EventBridge to invoke the Lambda function.

C.zh: 配置运行 Amazon Linux 的 Amazon EC2 竞价型实例的 Auto Scaling 组。在实例上配置 crontab 条目以运行分析。
C.en: Configure an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 Spot Instances that run Amazon Linux. Configure a crontab entry on the instances to run the analysis.

D.zh: 配置 AWS DataSync 任务以运行作业。配置 cron 表达式以按计划运行任务。
D.en: Configure an AWS DataSync task to run the job. Configure a cron expression to run the task on a schedule.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： AWS Fargate是一项无服务器容器运行服务，支持不间断运行长期任务。与 Amazon ECS 和 EventBridge Scheduler 相结合，可以可靠地计划任务并运行直至完成。优点： Fargate 任务是无状态的，不会受到底层基础设施中断的影响，这使得它们非常适合运行关键任务。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: AWS Fargate is a serverless container running service that supports running long-term tasks without interruption. Combined with Amazon ECS and EventBridge Scheduler, tasks can be reliably scheduled and run to completion. Pros: Fargate tasks are stateless and not affected by disruptions to the underlying infrastructure, making them ideal for running critical tasks.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： AWS Lambda适合运行短期任务（最多15分钟），但题目要求任务运行至少1小时，所以Lambda不适合这种场景。缺点： Lambda的运行时间限制无法满足任务需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: AWS Lambda is suitable for running short-term tasks (up to 15 minutes), but the question requires the task to run for at least 1 hour, so Lambda is not suitable for this scenario. Disadvantages: Lambda's running time limit cannot meet task requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： EC2 竞价型实例价格实惠，但可能会出现中断，无法保证任务的连续性。该问题明确要求任务不能容忍中断。缺点：竞价型实例存在中断风险，不适合运行关键任务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: EC2 Spot instances are affordable, but there may be interruptions and the continuity of tasks cannot be guaranteed. The problem explicitly requires that the task cannot tolerate interruptions. Disadvantages: Spot instances are at risk of outage, making them unsuitable for running critical tasks.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： AWS DataSync主要用于数据迁移和同步，而不是运行计算任务。该选项不符合题目要求。缺点： DataSync不适合运行分析任务。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: AWS DataSync is mainly used for data migration and synchronization, rather than running computing tasks. This option does not meet the question requirements. Disadvantages: DataSync is not suitable for running analysis tasks.

answer_text.zh: A. 为作业创建一个容器。使用 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 安排作业作为 AWS Fargate 任务在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群上运行。
answer_text.en: A. Create a container for the job. Schedule the job to run as an AWS Fargate task on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster by using Amazon EventBridge Scheduler.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析： AWS Fargate是一项无服务器容器运行服务，支持不间断运行长期任务。与 Amazon ECS 和 EventBridge Scheduler 相结合，可以可靠地计划任务并运行直至完成。优点： Fargate 任务是无状态的，不会受到底层基础设施中断的影响，这使得它们非常适合运行关键任务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: AWS Fargate is a serverless container running service that supports running long-term tasks without interruption. Combined with Amazon ECS and EventBridge Scheduler, tasks can be reliably scheduled and run to completion. Pros: Fargate tasks are stateless and not affected by disruptions to the underlying infrastructure, making them ideal for running critical tasks.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 云中运行工作负载。该公司希望集中收集安全数据，以评估整个公司的安全性并改善工作负载保护。哪种解决方案能够以最少的开发工作满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs workloads in the AWS Cloud. The company wants to centrally collect security data to assess security across the entire company and to improve workload protection. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

A.zh: 在 AWS Lake Formation 中配置数据湖。使用 AWS Glue 爬网程序将安全数据提取到数据湖中。
A.en: Configure a data lake in AWS Lake Formation. Use AWS Glue crawlers to ingest the security data into the data lake.

B.zh: 配置 AWS Lambda 函数以收集 .csv 格式的安全数据。将数据上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶。
B.en: Configure an AWS Lambda function to collect the security data in .csv format. Upload the data to an Amazon S3 bucket.

C.zh: 在 Amazon Security Lake 中配置数据湖以收集安全数据。将数据上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶。
C.en: Configure a data lake in Amazon Security Lake to collect the security data. Upload the data to an Amazon S3 bucket.

D.zh: 配置 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 复制实例以将安全数据加载到 Amazon RDS 集群中。
D.en: Configure an AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) replication instance to load the security data into an Amazon RDS cluster.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Lake Formation 主要用于构建和管理数据湖，但它并不是专门为安全数据设计的解决方案。需要额外的开发工作来配置 Glue 爬虫来收集和处理安全数据。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lake Formation is primarily used to build and manage data lakes, but it is not a solution specifically designed for secure data. Additional development work is required to configure Glue crawlers to collect and process security data.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然可以使用Lambda来收集数据并上传到S3，但这种方法需要编写和维护Lambda函数，开发工作量较大。此外，这种方法缺乏专用的安全数据管理功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Lambda can be used to collect data and upload it to S3, this method requires writing and maintaining Lambda functions, which requires a large development workload. Additionally, this approach lacks dedicated secure data management capabilities.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon Security Lake 是一项旨在集中收集和管理安全数据的服务。它支持自动化数据收集和存储，减少开发工作量。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Security Lake is a service designed to centrally collect and manage security data. It supports automated data collection and storage, reducing development effort.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS DMS 主要用于数据库迁移，而不是安全数据的集中收集和管理。使用 RDS 存储安全数据需要额外的开发工作来设计和管理数据库架构。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DMS is primarily used for database migration rather than centralized collection and management of security data. Using RDS to store secure data requires additional development work to design and manage the database schema.

answer_text.zh: C. 在 Amazon Security Lake 中配置数据湖以收集安全数据。将数据上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶。
answer_text.en: C. Configure a data lake in Amazon Security Lake to collect the security data. Upload the data to an Amazon S3 bucket.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon Security Lake 是一项旨在集中收集和管理安全数据的服务。它支持自动化数据收集和存储，减少开发工作量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Security Lake is a service designed to centrally collect and manage security data. It supports automated data collection and storage, reducing development effort.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将五个本地应用程序迁移到 AWS 云中的 VPC。每个应用程序当前都部署在本地隔离的虚拟网络中，并且应该在 AWS 云中进行类似的部署。应用程序需要到达共享服务 VPC。所有应用程序必须能够相互通信。如果迁移成功，该公司将为100多个应用程序重复迁移过程。哪种解决方案能够以最少的管理开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating five on-premises applications to VPCs in the AWS Cloud. Each application is currently deployed in isolated virtual networks on premises and should be deployed similarly in the AWS Cloud. The applications need to reach a shared services VPC. All the applications must be able to communicate with each other. If the migration is successful, the company will repeat the migration process for more than 100 applications. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead?

A.zh: 在应用程序 VPC 和共享服务 VPC 之间部署软件 VPN 隧道。将子网中应用程序 VPC 之间的路由添加到共享服务 VPC。
A.en: Deploy software VPN tunnels between the application VPCs and the shared services VPC. Add routes between the application VPCs in their subnets to the shared services VPC.

B.zh: 在应用程序 VPC 和共享服务 VPC 之间部署 VPC 对等连接。通过对等连接将子网中的应用程序 VPC 之间的路由添加到共享服务 VPC。
B.en: Deploy VPC peering connections between the application VPCs and the shared services VPC. Add routes between the application VPCs in their subnets to the shared services VPC through the peering connection.

C.zh: 在应用程序 VPC 和共享服务 VPAdd 之间部署 AWS Direct Connect 连接，从其子网中的应用程序 VPC 路由到共享服务 VPC 和应用程序 VPC。添加从共享服务 VPC 子网到应用程序 VPC 的路由。
C.en: Deploy an AWS Direct Connect connection between the application VPCs and the shared services VPAdd routes from the application VPCs in their subnets to the shared services VPC and the applications VPCs. Add routes from the shared services VPC subnets to the applications VPCs.

D.zh: 部署一个中转网关，并在中转网关与应用程序 VPC 和共享服务 VPC 之间建立关联。通过中转网关添加子网中的应用程序 VPC 与共享服务 VPC 之间的应用程序 VPC 之间的路由。
D.en: Deploy a transit gateway with associations between the transit gateway and the application VPCs and the shared services VPC. Add routes between the application VPCs in their subnets and the application VPCs to the shared services VPC through the transit gateway.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在冷应用超过100个的场景下，自动配置和维护VPN隧道的管理开销非常高，不满足“最小管理开销”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: In a scenario where there are more than 100 cold applications, the management overhead of automatically configuring and maintaining VPN tunnels is very high and does not meet the requirement of "minimum management overhead".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：随着冷应用数量的增加， VPC Peering 连接数量会呈指数级增长，导致管理开销非常高，不适合大规模场景。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: As the number of cold applications increases, the number of VPC Peering connections will increase exponentially, resulting in very high management overhead and not suitable for large-scale scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专线不适合解决VPC之间的通信问题，且成本较高，无法满足问题的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Private lines are not suitable for solving communication problems between VPCs, and the cost is high and cannot meet the requirements of the problem.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： Transit Gateway支持集中路由管理，降低迁移配置的复杂度，非常适合100个以上应用的场景。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Transit Gateway supports centralized routing management, reducing the complexity of migration configuration, and is very suitable for scenarios with more than 100 applications.

answer_text.zh: D. 部署一个中转网关，并在中转网关与应用程序 VPC 和共享服务 VPC 之间建立关联。通过中转网关添加子网中的应用程序 VPC 与共享服务 VPC 之间的应用程序 VPC 之间的路由。
answer_text.en: D. Deploy a transit gateway with associations between the transit gateway and the application VPCs and the shared services VPC. Add routes between the application VPCs in their subnets and the application VPCs to the shared services VPC through the transit gateway.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (93%) 7%。热门讨论与考点摘要： Transit Gateway支持集中路由管理，降低迁移配置的复杂度，非常适合100个以上应用的场景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (93%) 7%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Transit Gateway supports centralized routing management, reducing the complexity of migration configuration, and is very suitable for scenarios with more than 100 applications.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 在混合环境中运行其本地应用程序。该应用程序目前在本地容器上运行。该公司需要一个可以在本地、混合或云环境中扩展的单一容器解决方案。该公司必须在 AWS 云中运行新的应用程序容器，并且必须对 HTTP 流量使用负载均衡器。哪种行动组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company wants to use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) to run its on-premises application in a hybrid environment. The application currently runs on containers on premises. The company needs a single container solution that can scale in an on-premises, hybrid, or cloud environment. The company must run new application containers in the AWS Cloud and must use a load balancer for HTTP traffic. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 设置使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型作为云应用程序容器的 ECS 集群。对本地应用程序容器使用 Amazon ECS Anywhere 外部启动类型。
A.en: Set up an ECS cluster that uses the AWS Fargate launch type for the cloud application containers. Use an Amazon ECS Anywhere external launch type for the on-premises application containers.

B.zh: 为云 ECS 服务设置应用程序负载均衡器。
B.en: Set up an Application Load Balancer for cloud ECS services.

C.zh: 为云 ECS 服务设置网络负载均衡器。
C.en: Set up a Network Load Balancer for cloud ECS services.

D.zh: 设置使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型的 ECS 集群。将 Fargate 用于云应用程序容器和本地应用程序容器。
D.en: Set up an ECS cluster that uses the AWS Fargate launch type. Use Fargate for the cloud application containers and the on- premises application containers.

E.zh: 设置使用 Amazon EC2 启动类型作为云应用程序容器的 ECS 集群。将 Amazon ECS Anywhere 与 AWS Fargate 启动类型用于本地应用程序容器。
E.en: Set up an ECS cluster that uses the Amazon EC2 launch type for the cloud application containers. Use Amazon ECS Anywhere with an AWS Fargate launch type for the on-premises application containers.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Fargate 是一种为云应用程序容器运行容器的无服务器方式。 Amazon ECS Anywhere 允许在本地运行容器并与 AWS 集成，以满足混合环境需求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Fargate is a serverless way to run containers for cloud application containers. Amazon ECS Anywhere allows running containers locally and integrating with AWS to meet hybrid environment needs.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Application Load Balancer 支持 HTTP/HTTPS 流量，是运行 Web 应用程序的最佳选择。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Application Load Balancer supports HTTP/HTTPS traffic and is the best choice for running web applications.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络负载均衡器主要用来处理TCP/UDP流量，而题目明确要求处理HTTP流量，所以不适合。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network load balancers are mainly used to process TCP/UDP traffic, and the question clearly requires processing HTTP traffic, so it is not suitable.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Fargate 仅支持在云中运行容器，无法直接在本地环境中使用。题目要求支持混合环境，所以这个选项不满足要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Fargate only supports running containers in the cloud and cannot be used directly in on-premises environments. The question requires supporting a mixed environment, so this option does not meet the requirements.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon ECS Anywhere 不支持本地环境的 AWS Fargate 启动类型。此选项不符合技术限制。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ECS Anywhere does not support the AWS Fargate launch type for on-premises environments. This option does not meet technical limitations.

answer_text.zh: A. 设置使用 AWS Fargate 启动类型作为云应用程序容器的 ECS 集群。对本地应用程序容器使用 Amazon ECS Anywhere 外部启动类型。；B. 为云 ECS 服务设置应用程序负载均衡器。
answer_text.en: A. Set up an ECS cluster that uses the AWS Fargate launch type for the cloud application containers. Use an Amazon ECS Anywhere external launch type for the on-premises application containers.; B. Set up an Application Load Balancer for cloud ECS services.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： AB (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Fargate 是一种为云应用程序容器运行容器的无服务器方式。 Amazon ECS Anywhere 允许在本地运行容器并与 AWS 集成，以满足混合环境需求。； Application Load Balancer 支持 HTTP/HTTPS 流量，是运行 Web 应用程序的最佳选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AB (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Fargate is a serverless way to run containers for cloud application containers. Amazon ECS Anywhere allows running containers locally and integrating with AWS to meet hybrid environment needs.; Application Load Balancer supports HTTP/HTTPS traffic and is the best choice for running web applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将其工作负载迁移到 AWS。该公司在 SQL Server 实例上运行的本地关系数据库中拥有敏感和关键数据。该公司希望使用 AWS 云来提高安全性并减少数据库的运营开销。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its workloads to AWS. The company has sensitive and critical data in on-premises relational databases that run on SQL Server instances. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud to increase security and reduce operational overhead for the databases. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将数据库迁移到 Amazon EC2 实例。使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS 托管密钥进行加密。
A.en: Migrate the databases to Amazon EC2 instances. Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key for encryption.

B.zh: 将数据库迁移到多可用区 Amazon RDS for SQL Server 数据库实例。使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS 托管密钥进行加密。
B.en: Migrate the databases to a Multi-AZ Amazon RDS for SQL Server DB instance. Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key for encryption.

C.zh: 将数据迁移到 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Macie 确保数据安全。
C.en: Migrate the data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon Macie to ensure data security.

D.zh: 将数据库迁移到 Amazon DynamoDB 表。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 确保数据安全。
D.en: Migrate the databases to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to ensure data security.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然可以在 EC2 实例上运行 SQL Server 并使用 KMS 进行加密，但这种方法会增加运营开销，因为它需要手动管理 EC2 实例的操作系统和数据库软件的安装和维护。 “降低运维开销”不符合题目的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While it is possible to run SQL Server on an EC2 instance and use KMS for encryption, this approach increases operational overhead because it requires manual management of the installation and maintenance of the EC2 instance's operating system and database software. "Reducing operation and maintenance overhead" does not meet the requirements of the title.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon RDS 是一项托管服务，可减少运营开销并支持多可用区部署以提高可用性。 RDS支持KMS进行数据加密，满足问题中的安全要求。完全满足“增加安全性”和“降低运维开销”的问题需求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon RDS is a managed service that reduces operational overhead and supports multi-AZ deployments for increased availability. RDS supports KMS for data encryption to meet the security requirements in the question. It fully meets the problem needs of "increasing security" and "reducing operation and maintenance overhead".

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 是一种对象存储服务，不适合存储关系数据库数据。 Amazon Macie 主要用于识别敏感数据，而不是直接管理数据库安全。 “迁移关系数据库”不符合问题的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is an object storage service and is not suitable for storing relational database data. Amazon Macie is primarily designed to identify sensitive data rather than directly manage database security. "Migrating a relational database" does not meet the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon DynamoDB 是一种 NoSQL 数据库服务，不适合迁移 SQL Server 关系数据库。 CloudWatch Logs用于监控和日志记录，不直接提供数据安全功能。 “迁移关系数据库”不符合问题的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DynamoDB is a NoSQL database service and is not suitable for migrating SQL Server relational databases. CloudWatch Logs is used for monitoring and logging and does not directly provide data security functions. "Migrating a relational database" does not fit the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 将数据库迁移到多可用区 Amazon RDS for SQL Server 数据库实例。使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS 托管密钥进行加密。
answer_text.en: B. Migrate the databases to a Multi-AZ Amazon RDS for SQL Server DB instance. Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key for encryption.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon RDS 是一项托管服务，可减少运营开销并支持多可用区部署以提高可用性。 RDS支持KMS进行数据加密，满足问题中的安全要求。完全满足“增加安全性”和“降低运维开销”的问题需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon RDS is a managed service that reduces operational overhead and supports multi-AZ deployments for increased availability. RDS supports KMS for data encryption to meet the security requirements in the question. It fully meets the problem needs of "increasing security" and "reducing operation and maintenance overhead".

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要将应用程序迁移到 AWS。该公司希望提高该应用程序的当前可用性。该公司希望在应用程序架构中使用 AWS WAF。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate an application to AWS. The company wants to increase the application's current availability. The company wants to use AWS WAF in the application's architecture. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 创建一个包含多个 Amazon EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 组，这些实例跨两个可用区托管应用程序。配置应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 并将 Auto Scaling 组设置为目标。将WAF连接到ALB。
A.en: Create an Auto Scaling group that contains multiple Amazon EC2 instances that host the application across two Availability Zones. Configure an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and set the Auto Scaling group as the target. Connect a WAF to the ALB.

B.zh: 创建一个集群置放组，其中包含托管应用程序的多个 Amazon EC2 实例。配置应用程序负载均衡器并将 EC2 实例设置为目标。将 WAF 连接到置放组。
B.en: Create a cluster placement group that contains multiple Amazon EC2 instances that hosts the application. Configure an Application Load Balancer and set the EC2 instances as the targets. Connect a WAF to the placement group.

C.zh: 创建两个 Amazon EC2 实例，跨两个可用区托管应用程序。将 EC2 实例配置为应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 的目标。将WAF连接到ALB。
C.en: Create two Amazon EC2 instances that host the application across two Availability Zones. Configure the EC2 instances as the targets of an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Connect a WAF to the ALB.

D.zh: 创建一个包含多个 Amazon EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 组，这些实例跨两个可用区托管应用程序。配置应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 并将 Auto Scaling 组设置为目标。将 WAF 连接到 Auto Scaling 组。
D.en: Create an Auto Scaling group that contains multiple Amazon EC2 instances that host the application across two Availability Zones. Configure an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and set the Auto Scaling group as the target. Connect a WAF to the Auto Scaling group.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项支持通过 Auto Scaling 组进行动态扩展，并跨两个可用区部署 EC2 实例以提高可用性。正确：使用应用程序负载均衡器来分配流量并确保高性能和可靠性。正确：将 WAF 连接到 ALB 是保护应用程序的最佳实践。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option enables dynamic scaling through Auto Scaling groups and deploys EC2 instances across two Availability Zones for increased availability. Correct: Use an application load balancer to distribute traffic and ensure high performance and reliability. Correct: Connecting a WAF to an ALB is a best practice for protecting your application.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：集群置放组主要用于低延迟、高性能计算，而不是提高可用性。错误：此选项不会跨多个可用区部署资源来满足高可用性要求。正确： WAF可以接入ALB，但是该选项的架构设计不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Cluster placement groups are primarily used for low-latency, high-performance computing rather than improving availability. Error: This option does not deploy resources across multiple Availability Zones to meet high availability requirements. Correct: WAF can be connected to ALB, but the architectural design of this option does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: A. 创建一个包含多个 Amazon EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 组，这些实例跨两个可用区托管应用程序。配置应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 并将 Auto Scaling 组设置为目标。将WAF连接到ALB。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Auto Scaling group that contains multiple Amazon EC2 instances that host the application across two Availability Zones. Configure an Application Load Balancer (ALB) and set the Auto Scaling group as the target. Connect a WAF to the ALB.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项支持通过 Auto Scaling 组进行动态扩展，并跨两个可用区部署 EC2 实例以提高可用性。正确：使用应用程序负载均衡器来分配流量并确保高性能和可靠性。正确：将 WAF 连接到 ALB 是保护应用程序的最佳实践。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option enables dynamic scaling through Auto Scaling groups and deploys EC2 instances across two Availability Zones for increased availability. Correct: Use an application load balancer to distribute traffic and ensure high performance and reliability. Correct: Connecting a WAF to an ALB is a best practice for protecting your application.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司管理 Amazon S3 存储桶中的数据湖，可供众多应用程序访问。 S3 存储桶包含每个应用程序的唯一前缀。该公司希望将每个应用程序限制为其特定的前缀，并对每个前缀下的对象进行精细控制。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company manages a data lake in an Amazon S3 bucket that numerous applications access. The S3 bucket contains a unique prefix for each application. The company wants to restrict each application to its specific prefix and to have granular control of the objects under each prefix. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 为每个应用程序创建专用 S3 接入点和接入点策略。
A.en: Create dedicated S3 access points and access point policies for each application.

B.zh: 创建 S3 批量操作作业以设置 S3 存储桶中每个对象的 ACL 权限。
B.en: Create an S3 Batch Operations job to set the ACL permissions for each object in the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 将 S3 存储桶中的对象复制到每个应用程序的新 S3 存储桶。按前缀创建复制规则。
C.en: Replicate the objects in the S3 bucket to new S3 buckets for each application. Create replication rules by prefix.

D.zh: 将 S3 存储桶中的对象复制到每个应用程序的新 S3 存储桶。为每个应用程序创建专用的 S3 访问点。
D.en: Replicate the objects in the S3 bucket to new S3 buckets for each application. Create dedicated S3 access points for each application.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： S3 接入点允许为每个应用程序创建独立的接入点，并通过接入点策略启用基于前缀的权限管理。此类限制可以直接限制单个应用程序访问特定前缀，同时减少运营开销。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 access points allow the creation of independent access points for each application and enable prefix-based permission management through access point policies. Such restrictions can directly restrict individual applications from accessing specific prefixes while reducing operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3批量操作适合对象的批量处理，但ACL权限管理是基于对象的，非标准权限控制是基于前缀的。另外， ACL的管理复杂度较高，操作开销较大。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 batch operations are suitable for batch processing of objects, but ACL permission management is based on objects, and non-standard permission control is based on prefixes. In addition, the management complexity of ACL is high and the operation overhead is high.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：创建多个 S3 存储桶并设置复制规则会增加存储成本和管理复杂性。虽然可以通过前缀字面量来分隔，但是这样的方条的操作开销较高，不满足“最小操作开销”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Creating multiple S3 buckets and setting up replication rules increases storage costs and management complexity. Although it can be separated by prefix literals, the operation overhead of such square bars is high and does not meet the requirement of "minimum operation overhead".

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 S3 访问点简化了权限管理，但将对象复制到多个 S3 存储桶会增加存储成本和管理复杂性。此类派对酒吧的运营费用较高。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While S3 access points simplify permissions management, copying objects to multiple S3 buckets increases storage costs and management complexity. The operating expenses of this type of party bar are higher.

answer_text.zh: A. 为每个应用程序创建专用 S3 接入点和接入点策略。
answer_text.en: A. Create dedicated S3 access points and access point policies for each application.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (85%) B (15%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： S3 接入点允许为每个应用程序创建独立的接入点，并通过接入点策略启用基于前缀的权限管理。此类限制可以直接限制单个应用程序访问特定前缀，同时减少运营开销。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (85%) B (15%). Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 access points allow the creation of independent access points for each application and enable prefix-based permission management through access point policies. Such restrictions can directly restrict individual applications from accessing specific prefixes while reducing operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序，客户可以使用该应用程序将图像上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶。每天晚上，该公司都会启动一个 Amazon EC2 竞价型实例集来处理该公司当天收到的所有图像。每个图像的处理需要 2 分钟，需要 512 MB 内存。解决方案架构师需要更改应用程序以在上传图像时处理图像。哪种改变能够最经济有效地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an application that customers use to upload images to an Amazon S3 bucket. Each night, the company launches an Amazon EC2 Spot Fleet that processes all the images that the company received that day. The processing for each image takes 2 minutes and requires 512 MB of memory. A solutions architect needs to change the application to process the images when the images are uploaded. Which change will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 S3 事件通知将包含图像详细信息的消息写入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置 AWS Lambda 函数以从队列中读取消息并处理图像。
A.en: Use S3 Event Notifications to write a message with image details to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure an AWS Lambda function to read the messages from the queue and to process the images.

B.zh: 使用 S3 事件通知将包含图像详细信息的消息写入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置 EC2 预留实例以从队列中读取消息并处理图像。
B.en: Use S3 Event Notifications to write a message with image details to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure an EC2 Reserved Instance to read the messages from the queue and to process the images.

C.zh: 使用 S3 事件通知将包含图像详细信息的消息发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 中配置容器实例以订阅主题并处理图像。
C.en: Use S3 Event Notifications to publish a message with image details to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure a container instance in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) to subscribe to the topic and to process the images.

D.zh: 使用 S3 事件通知将包含图像详细信息的消息发布到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。配置 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 应用程序以订阅主题并处理图像。
D.en: Use S3 Event Notifications to publish a message with image details to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Configure an AWS Elastic Beanstalk application to subscribe to the topic and to process the images.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： S3 事件通知可以触发消息写入 SQS 队列， AWS Lambda 可以无服务器处理这些消息， Lambda 函数的按需计费模型非常适合耗时的处理任务（例如 2 分钟）。经济高效： Lambda 函数不需要预先配置的资源，并且 512 MB 内存需求完全在 Lambda 的支持范围内。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 event notifications can trigger messages to be written to SQS queues, AWS Lambda can process these messages serverlessly, and the on-demand billing model of Lambda functions is ideal for time-consuming processing tasks (e.g. 2 minutes). Cost-effective: Lambda functions require no preconfigured resources, and the 512 MB memory requirement is well within Lambda's support.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 EC2 预留实例可以处理任务，但它需要预配置资源并支付固定费用，即使没有任务运行，这也会产生成本。不经济： EC2 预留实例比 Lambda 更昂贵且管理更复杂。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While an EC2 Reserved Instance can handle tasks, it requires provisioning resources and paying a fixed fee, which incurs costs even when no tasks are running. Uneconomical: EC2 Reserved Instances are more expensive and more complex to manage than Lambda.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： SNS 无法触发 ECS 容器实例。 ECS 需要额外的任务调度和管理，这增加了复杂性。成本效益较低： ECS容器实例需要持续运行或调度，可能会产生额外成本。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SNS cannot trigger ECS container instances. ECS requires additional task scheduling and management, which adds complexity. Less cost-effective: ECS container instances need to be continuously run or scheduled, which may incur additional costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Elastic Beanstalk 适合运行复杂的应用程序，但对于简单的图像处理任务来说过于复杂且昂贵。不经济： Elastic Beanstalk 需要稳定的运行环境，并且可能会产生额外的成本。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Elastic Beanstalk is suitable for running complex applications, but is too complex and expensive for simple image processing tasks. Uneconomical: Elastic Beanstalk requires a stable operating environment and may incur additional costs.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 S3 事件通知将包含图像详细信息的消息写入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。配置 AWS Lambda 函数以从队列中读取消息并处理图像。
answer_text.en: A. Use S3 Event Notifications to write a message with image details to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure an AWS Lambda function to read the messages from the queue and to process the images.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： S3 事件通知可以触发消息写入 SQS 队列， AWS Lambda 可以无服务器处理这些消息， Lambda 函数的按需计费模型非常适合耗时的处理任务（例如 2 分钟）。经济高效： Lambda 函数不需要预先配置的资源，并且 512 MB 内存需求完全在 Lambda 的支持范围内。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 event notifications can trigger messages to be written to SQS queues, AWS Lambda can process these messages serverlessly, and the on-demand billing model of Lambda functions is ideal for time-consuming processing tasks (e.g. 2 minutes). Cost-effective: Lambda functions require no preconfigured resources, and the 512 MB memory requirement is well within Lambda's support.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望提高其混合应用程序的可用性和性能。该应用程序由托管在不同 AWS 区域的 Amazon EC2 实例上的有状态 TCP 工作负载和本地托管的无状态基于 UDP 的工作负载组成。解决方案架构师应该采取哪些操作组合来提高可用性和性能？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company wants to improve the availability and performance of its hybrid application. The application consists of a stateful TCP- based workload hosted on Amazon EC2 instances in different AWS Regions and a stateless UDP-based workload hosted on premises. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect take to improve availability and performance? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器。添加负载均衡器作为端点。
A.en: Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator. Add the load balancers as endpoints.

B.zh: 创建一个 Amazon CloudFront 分配，其源使用 Amazon Route 53 基于延迟的路由将请求路由到负载均衡器。
B.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin that uses Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to the load balancers.

C.zh: 在每个区域中配置两个应用程序负载均衡器。第一个将路由到 EC2 端点，第二个将路由到本地点。
C.en: Configure two Application Load Balancers in each Region. The first will route to the EC2 endpoints, and the second will route to the on-premises endpoints.

D.zh: 在每个区域中配置网络负载均衡器以寻址 EC2 终端节点。在每个区域中配置路由到本地终端节点的网络负载均衡器。
D.en: Configure a Network Load Balancer in each Region to address the EC2 endpoints. Configure a Network Load Balancer in each Region that routes to the on-premises endpoints.

E.zh: 在每个区域中配置网络负载均衡器以寻址 EC2 终端节点。在每个区域中配置路由到本地点的应用程序负载均衡器。
E.en: Configure a Network Load Balancer in each Region to address the EC2 endpoints. Configure an Application Load Balancer in each Region that routes to the on-premises endpoints.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 AWS Global Accelerator 可以通过优化路由来提高跨区域应用程序的性能和可用性。支持使用负载均衡器作为端点的跨区域流量管理。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. AWS Global Accelerator can improve the performance and availability of cross-region applications by optimizing routing. Support cross-region traffic management using load balancers as endpoints.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 CloudFront 主要用于内容交付 (CDN)，相关应用程序基于 TCP 和 UDP 工作负载。 CloudFront 并非旨在处理此类流量。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. CloudFront is primarily used for content delivery (CDN), and the application in question is based on TCP and UDP workloads. CloudFront is not designed to handle this type of traffic.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 Application Load Balancer主要用于HTTP/HTTPS流量，问题中的工作负载是基于TCP和UDP的，因此不适合使用ALB。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Application Load Balancer is mainly used for HTTP/HTTPS traffic, and the workload in the question is TCP and UDP based, so it is not suitable to use ALB.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。网络负载均衡器支持 TCP 和 UDP 流量，适合处理相关工作负载。配置 NLB 可以提高可用性和性能。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. Network Load Balancer supports TCP and UDP traffic and is suitable for handling related workloads. Configuring NLB can improve availability and performance.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。虽然 NLB 适用于处理 EC2 端点的 TCP/UDP 流量，但 ALB 不适合处理本地点的 TCP/UDP 流量。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. While NLB is suitable for handling TCP/UDP traffic for EC2 endpoints, ALB is not suitable for handling TCP/UDP traffic for on-premises endpoints.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器。添加负载均衡器作为端点。；D. 在每个区域中配置网络负载均衡器以寻址 EC2 终端节点。在每个区域中配置路由到本地终端节点的网络负载均衡器。
answer_text.en: A. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator. Add the load balancers as endpoints.; D. Configure a Network Load Balancer in each Region to address the EC2 endpoints. Configure a Network Load Balancer in each Region that routes to the on-premises endpoints.
